title: cacalia hastata subsp. lancifolia
intro: Cacalia hastata subsp. lancifolia, also known as Lancetleaf American Columbo, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its anti-inflammatory properties have also been shown to be beneficial in reducing pain and swelling. Cacalia hastata subsp. lancifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
